since_last: 28% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.02%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.71% · BTC -0.98% · Gold +0.82% · Nasdaq100 -1.28%. 28% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.02%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.02%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.22%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.48%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +6.34%, LEU +3.09%, PANW +2.22%, CSCO +1.95%, MU +1.85%. Laggards: ISRG -12.48%, PUBM -5.96%, SPCX -5.78%, UPST -5.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.78% at $123.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
